title: Underminer
description:
Welcome. New miner!

Interesting underground world!Different minerals and formations, underground caves and treasure maps.
There's a lot of interesting stuff under the ground!

Get stronger to explore!Get closer to the 'King of Miner' rank.
The more powerful drill machines you upgrade to, the deeper underground you can explore!

Legendary Minerals in the Veil!Find clues to the legendary minerals hidden in ancient air defenses.
Help the people of the underworld and you'll be one step closer to the secret.

Adventure awaits!
description_short: Welcome to Underminer, an underground adventure game set in a subterranean world. Mine minerals, earn money, upgrade your drill machine and descend deeper into the earth. The truth about 'legendary minerals' and an exciting underground world are waiting for you!
